sentences.arabic: فِي ظِلِّ الِاعْتِمَادِ الْمُتَزَايِدِ عَلَى خَرَائِطِ الْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ، فَقَدَ الْبَعْضُ مَهَارَةَ قِرَاءَةِ الْخَرَائِطِ الْوَرَقِيَّةِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: U sjeni sve veće ovisnosti o mapama na pametnim telefonima, neki su izgubili vještinu čitanja tradicionalnih papirnih mapa.
sentences.translationEn: In light of the increasing reliance on smartphone maps, some have lost the skill of reading traditional paper maps.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ حَمْلَ خَرِيطَةٍ مَطْبُوعَةٍ لِلْمَدِينَةِ يَبْقَى أَمْرًا ضَرُورِيًّا، خَاصَّةً عِنْدَ السَّفَرِ إِلَى مَنَاطِقَ تَنْقَطِعُ فِيهَا شَبَكَةُ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, nošenje štampane mape grada ostaje neophodno, posebno pri putovanju u područja gdje se prekida internet veza.
sentences.translationEn: However, carrying a printed map of the city remains essential, especially when traveling to areas where the internet connection is interrupted.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الْخَرِيطَةُ فِي رَسْمِ صُورَةٍ ذِهْنِيَّةٍ شَامِلَةٍ لِتَخْطِيطِ الشَّوَارِعِ وَتَوْزِيعِ الْأَحْيَاءِ السَّكَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mapa pomaže u stvaranju sveobuhvatne mentalne slike o planu ulica i rasporedu stambenih naselja.
sentences.translationEn: A map helps in drawing a comprehensive mental picture of street planning and the distribution of residential neighborhoods.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ الِاسْتِعَانَةَ بِأَجْهِزَةِ التَّمَوْقُعِ الْعَالَمِيِّ تُسَهِّلُ الْعُثُورَ عَلَى أَقْصَرِ الطُّرُقِ لِلْوُصُولِ إِلَى الْوِجْهَاتِ الْمَقْصُودَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također, korištenje GPS uređaja olakšava pronalaženje najkraćih puteva do željenih odredišta.
sentences.translationEn: Also, the use of GPS devices facilitates finding the shortest routes to reach intended destinations.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّ أَجْمَلَ اللَّحَظَاتِ هِيَ تِلْكَ الَّتِي نَضِلُّ فِيهَا الطَّرِيقَ لِنَكْتَشِفَ أَمَاكِنَ خَفِيَّةً لَمْ تَكُنْ مُدْرَجَةً فِي دَلِيلِ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ali najljepši trenuci su oni u kojima zalutamo kako bismo otkrili skrivena mjesta koja nisu bila navedena u turističkom vodiču.
sentences.translationEn: But the most beautiful moments are those in which we lose our way to discover hidden places that were not listed in the travel guide.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّوَازُنَ بَيْنَ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا وَالْحِسِّ الِاسْتِكْشَافِيِّ يَجْعَلُ مِنَ التَّجَوُّلِ مُغَامَرَةً لَا تُنْسَى.
sentences.translation: Ravnoteža između tehnologije i istraživačkog osjećaja pretvara obilazak u nezaboravnu avanturu.
sentences.translationEn: The balance between technology and the exploratory sense makes wandering an unforgettable adventure.
